questions.question: Which country attacked Israel with drones and missiles in April 2024?
questions.explanation: Iran launched over 300 drones and missiles at Israel on April 13-14, 2024.

questions.question: Which European elections took place in June 2024?
questions.explanation: European Parliament elections were held June 6-9, 2024, with far-right gains.

questions.question: What was Donald Trump found guilty of in May 2024?
options: 34 felony counts of falsifying business records
questions.explanation: Trump was convicted on 34 felony counts in the New York hush money trial on May 30.

questions.question: Which AI company released GPT-4o in May 2024?
questions.explanation: OpenAI released GPT-4o ('o' for omni) with real-time voice and vision capabilities.

questions.question: Which country's president dissolved parliament and called snap elections in June 2024?
questions.explanation: President Macron dissolved the French National Assembly after EU election results.

questions.question: Who won the 2024 Eurovision Song Contest?
questions.explanation: Nemo from Switzerland won Eurovision 2024 in Malmö with 'The Code'.

questions.question: Which country legalized same-sex marriage in May 2024, a first in Southeast Asia?
questions.explanation: Thailand's parliament voted to legalize same-sex marriage in June 2024.

questions.question: Apple announced a partnership with which AI company at WWDC in June 2024?
questions.explanation: Apple announced Apple Intelligence with OpenAI's ChatGPT integration at WWDC 2024.

questions.question: Which football tournament began in Germany in June 2024?
questions.explanation: UEFA Euro 2024 kicked off in Germany on June 14.

questions.question: Who became India's Prime Minister after the 2024 elections?
questions.explanation: Narendra Modi won a third term, though with a reduced majority.

questions.question: Which country experienced devastating floods affecting millions in April-May 2024?
questions.explanation: Southern Brazil experienced catastrophic floods in April-May 2024.

questions.question: What major tech milestone did Nvidia reach in June 2024?
questions.explanation: Nvidia briefly became the world's most valuable company, surpassing Microsoft and Apple.

questions.question: Which volcano erupted in Iceland in early 2024, threatening a town?
questions.explanation: Volcanic eruptions near Grindavík on the Reykjanes Peninsula continued into 2024.

questions.question: Who won the French Open (Roland-Garros) men's singles in June 2024?
questions.explanation: Carlos Alcaraz won his first French Open title in 2024.

questions.question: Julian Assange reached a plea deal with the US and was released from prison in which country?
questions.explanation: Assange was released from Belmarsh Prison in the UK in June 2024 after a plea deal.
